transcript: some really nice buffs. Look how many people are very happy about the Infinity Edge changes. So, for Infinity Edge, it hasn't been that great since the item rework, and it just got a pretty damn cool buff. You know how apart from AD and crit, it also increases the crit damage you do? Well, that got increased from 40% bonus crit damage to 50% bonus crit damage. So when you buy Infinity Edge, instead of now doing 215% damage with crit damage, you can now do 20%
